raw_consumer_statement:
Date of Transaction - XX/XX/year> Amount - {$2800.00} Merchant XXXX XXXX On or about XX/XX/year> I received a security alert from my credit card company that someone was trying to use my card for a {$2800.00} purchase. I declined the charge called the credit card company and they sent me a new card. 

A few weeks later I received a letter from my credit card company Barclays stating that a dispute for {$2800.00} was resolved in the vendors favor because I had used XXXX before in XX/XX/year>. The XXXX transaction in XXXX was authorized my me. The {$2800.00} transaction was not mine nor my authorized user. Barclay is refusing to remove the charges and states that Im responsible. 

The fact that I used XXXX before does not mean Im responsible for fraudulent charges
